title: T-015 — QA-012 hold_create_modal (prototype parity)
prompt:
# T-015 — QA-012 hold_create_modal

PRD: 09-QUALITY-PRD.md §8.2 QA-012 fields, §8.5 prototype hold_create_modal
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Client Component dialog `HoldCreateModal` driven by react-hook-form + Zod that submits to createQualityHold (T-006). Matches prototype `quality/modals.jsx:22-96` 1:1.

## Implementation contract
1. `apps/web/src/components/quality/holds/HoldCreateModal.tsx` shadcn Dialog with fields per §8.2: Hold target (radio LP/batch/WO/PO/GRN + search input), Reason (Select from quality_hold_reasons grouped by category), Free text note (Textarea, required iff reason='other'), Priority (RadioGroup low/med/high/critical), Disposition (Select), Estimated release (DatePicker auto-default).
2. RHF + zodResolver with cross-field validation (note required when reason='other').
3. Submits to createQualityHold Server Action; on success closes dialog and triggers parent revalidate.
4. 1:1 parity vs `design/Monopilot Design System/quality/modals.jsx:22-96`.

## Files
- apps/web/src/components/quality/holds/HoldCreateModal.tsx [create]
- apps/web/src/components/quality/holds/__tests__/HoldCreateModal.test.tsx [create]
- design/Monopilot Design System/quality/modals.jsx [ref]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given the modal renders, when compared to design/Monopilot Design System/quality/modals.jsx:22-96, then it has parity with the prototype on structural parity (header + 6 fields in fixed order: Hold target radio + reference search, Reason Select, Free text Textarea, Priority RadioGroup, Disposition Select, Estimated Release DatePicker; footer Cancel(ghost) + Create(primary)), visual parity (shadcn Dialog/Form/Input/Select/Textarea/RadioGroup/DatePicker/Button only, no native HTML), and interaction parity (Free text becomes required when Reason='other', Estimated Release auto-fills from reason.default_hold_duration_days, Submit disabled when invalid) — verified by RTL test plus parity checklist in pipeline_inputs.details
2. Given form is submitted with reason='other' and free_text empty, when validation runs, then the form rejects with field error key qa.hold.note_required and createQualityHold is not called
3. Given form submits successfully, when createQualityHold returns hold_number, then the modal closes and parent receives onSuccess(hold_number)

pipeline_inputs.description: Hold create modal Dialog with RHF+Zod, 6 fields, parity with prototype hold_create_modal.
pipeline_inputs.details: shadcn Dialog with Form (RHF + zodResolver) per prototype design/Monopilot Design System/quality/modals.jsx:22-96. Fields in fixed order per §8.2. Reason Select reads from getHoldReasonOptions (T-001). Cross-field rule: note required when reason='other'. DatePicker default from reason.default_hold_duration_days. Submits to createQualityHold (T-006). Honor translation notes (no native select, server-side FK validation, role guard).
out_of_scope: Do not implement reference search autocomplete BL-QA-07 (deferred per prototype known_bugs)
Do not implement hold release modal (T-016)
Do not implement create-hold backend Server Action (T-006)

Given a submit with reason='other' and free_text empty, when validation runs, then the form rejects with qa.hold.note_required field error and createQualityHold is not called
Given a successful submit, when createQualityHold returns hold_number, then the modal closes and parent receives onSuccess(hold_number)
test_strategy: RED: write apps/web/src/components/quality/holds/__tests__/HoldCreateModal.test.tsx asserting field order, conditional validation, success flow
risk_red_lines: Do not use native HTML <select> per prototype translation notes
Do not skip cross-field validation for reason=='other' note
Do not bypass createQualityHold Server Action (no direct DB writes from client)
